name: Studio Force II Plus 72

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: AAE8C030-DFB2-11F0-B388-42010A37C006

comment: Studio Force II Plus 72 uses a homogenized LED source capable of delivering variable color temperature, plus/minus green shift control, and the ability to produce deep saturated colors when needed, the Studio Force II Plus is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events, and theatre lighting.

gwSpecs.description: Studio Force II Plus 72 uses a homogenized LED source capable of delivering variable color temperature, plus/minus green shift control, and the ability to produce deep saturated colors when needed, the Studio Force II Plus is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events, and theatre lighting.
